title: Oregon Democrats Release Transportation on ReInvestment Package (TRIP) 2025
content: Oregon Senator Chris Gorsek, D-Gresham, and Representative Susan McLain, D-Forest Grove, have unveiled the Transportation Reinvestment Package (TRIP) 2025. The initiative proposes a 20-cent increase in Oregon's gas tax, introduces a 1% tax on automobile sales to support the State Highway Fund, and mandates a new â€œroad usage chargeâ€ for electric vehicles . Once fully in effect, this package is expected to raise over $1.9 billion in new taxes and fees biennially.
author: Analysts Account
